title: Old Recording
description: Old recording (VHS) effect: grain, scanlines, scratches, and flicker.
body:
# Old Recording

**Old Recording** adds a vintage VHS-style recording effect to Minecraft.

The mod makes the game look like an old video recording by adding classic analog camera artifacts such as film grain, scanlines, scratches, and screen flicker. This creates an atmospheric retro look similar to old tapes and recordings.

## Features

* Film grain
* VHS scanlines
* Screen scratches
* Subtle flickering effect
* Adjustable effect intensity

## Controls

* **O** — Toggle the VHS effect on/off
* **P** — Increase the intensity of the effect

## Perfect for

* Horror maps 👻
* ARG-style experiences 📼
* Cinematic videos 🎥
* Retro or analog-style gameplay

## ⚠ Warning

This mod contains visual effects such as flickering and screen noise that may trigger discomfort for people with photosensitive conditions. If you are sensitive to flashing or flickering visuals, it is recommended not to use this mod.
